entry.title: thank you rubee and tom for having me and making me feel so welcome even though i developed several enemies whilst at the weddong

entry.title: no pizza guys were harmed in the making of this video. sorry pizza guy it’s not your fault. its not mine either. its a third thing
entry.content: no pizza guys were harmed in the making of this video. sorry pizza guy it’s not your fault. its not mine either. its a third thing
